Perform a final comprehensive audit of this codebase. Ensure it adheres to modern web development best practices across architecture, code quality, performance, security, and maintainability.

This repository will serve as a reusable template (“seed”) for multiple future projects, so prioritize:

Clean, modular, and scalable structure
Consistent patterns and naming conventions
Minimal technical debt
Clear separation of concerns

The system is intentionally file-based (no database) to keep complexity low—preserve this design choice and optimize within this constraint rather than introducing database dependencies.

Identify gaps, suggest improvements, and refactor where necessary to make this a high-quality, production-ready baseline.
